title: croton dispar
intro: Croton dispar, also known as the Croton lechleri, is a plant species native to the Amazon rainforest in South America, and its name 'Croton dispar' is an alternate name for Croton lechleri. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Its health benefits include wound healing, reducing fever, and treating diarrhea and dysentery. Herbal preparations of the Croton dispar plant are typically made into an extract or a paste, which can be applied topically to treat wounds or taken orally in a tea or capsule form.
